image_description: A map showing the strategic location of Dien Bien Phu in northern Vietnam.
learning_objective: Understand the strategic significance of Dien Bien Phu in the First Indochina War.

image_description: A map showing the strategic positions of French forces in Dien Bien Phu as part of the Navarre plan.
learning_objective: Understand the strategic objectives and outcomes of the Navarre plan during the Battle of Dien Bien Phu.

image_description: A diagram showing the internal mechanism of a delayed-action bomb.
learning_objective: Understand the purpose and mechanism of delayed-action bombs in disrupting supply lines.

image_description: A map showing the location of Dien Bien Phu district in Vietnam.
learning_objective: Identify the geographical location of Dien Bien Phu district.

image_description: A map showing the strategic locations involved in the Winter-Spring campaign.
learning_objective: Understand the strategic significance of the Winter-Spring campaign in the context of the Battle of Dien Bien Phu.
